rules.description: Mortgage interest rate must fall within the policy band of 2.0% to 18.0%. Values outside this band indicate a data-entry error or a policy breach.
rules.sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE report_date = :snapshot_date AND (interest_rate < 2.0 OR interest_rate > 18.0)

rules.description: A decision_date cannot precede the application_date — a referential time-order invariant.
rules.sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications WHERE report_date = :snapshot_date AND decision_date IS NOT NULL AND decision_date < application_date

rules.description: loan_id must be unique within a snapshot.
rules.sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT loan_id) FROM loans WHERE report_date = :snapshot_date

rules.description: credit_score is a critical data element for underwriting and capital reserves; null rate must remain at or below 5%.
rules.sql_query: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN credit_score IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE report_date = :snapshot_date

_truncated: 138 additional rules omitted in this example for brevity
